mapper.select: select m.id, m.stock_id, m.current_price, m.dividend_per_share, m.calculated_yield, m.data_time, m.create_time, s.stock_code, s.stock_name from stock_market_data m left join stock_basic s on m.stock_id = s.stock_id where m.stock_id = #{stockId} order by m.data_time DESC limit 1

select m.id, m.stock_id, m.current_price, m.dividend_per_share, m.calculated_yield, m.data_time, m.create_time, s.stock_code, s.stock_name from stock_market_data m left join stock_basic s on m.stock_id = s.stock_id where m.stock_id = #{stockId} order by m.data_time ASC
mapper.insert: insert into stock_market_data (stock_id, current_price, dividend_per_share, calculated_yield, data_time, create_time) values (#{stockId}, #{currentPrice}, #{dividendPerShare}, #{calculatedYield}, #{dataTime}, NOW())
mapper.select: select s.stock_code, s.stock_name, ROUND(AVG(m.calculated_yield), 2) as avg_yield, MAX(m.calculated_yield) as max_yield, MIN(m.calculated_yield) as min_yield, COUNT(*) as data_count, MAX(m.data_time) as latest_data_time from stock_market_data m join stock_basic s on m.stock_id = s.stock_id group by s.stock_id, s.stock_code, s.stock_name order by avg_yield DESC
